title: Handpainted Fruit Pizza Plate
description:
A big, bold pizza plate with a yellow rim and a deep blue centre, painted all around with a wreath of fruit. Our artisans in Vietri sul Mare shape it flat and wide on the wheel — the right proportions for a proper Neapolitan pizza — and then paint each piece freehand.

The design is generous: clusters of golden grapes, round oranges, red apples, and lemons, all connected by green leaves and twisting vines. The fruit sits on a warm yellow border, and the centre opens up into a deep cobalt blue field that makes the colours around it pop. It's a bold, confident plate.

At its size, it's ideal for pizza, but many customers use it for serving pasta, for a large salad, or as a decorative wall plate. The flat profile and slightly raised rim keep food where it should be. The glossy, food-safe glaze cleans up easily.

Made in small batches in Vietri sul Mare using traditional techniques. Because everything is painted by hand, the arrangement of the fruit varies slightly from plate to plate.
excerpt: A wide ceramic pizza plate with a blue centre and a wreath of hand-painted fruit on a yellow rim. Made in Vietri sul Mare.
seoTitle: Handpainted Fruit Pizza Plate — Ceramiche Da Mario
seoDescription: Handmade ceramic pizza plate with fruit wreath on yellow and cobalt blue, painted freehand in Vietri sul Mare. By Ceramiche Da Mario.
